{"translation":"Korean exporters face rising cost pressure as the won-dollar exchange rate stays near KRW 1,500. Companies with high exposure to dollar-priced raw materials and foreign-currency debt may see greater earnings volatility from the stronger exchange rate. The market said investors should check pricing power and hedging strategies in export sectors such as semiconductors and shipbuilding."}
